APPROVE
All three AC items satisfied: §5 thresholds explicitly scoped to ddx-agent only with cross-harness rule using mean+SD; §7.1 multi-harness extension cross-references SD-010 with required caveat block and ≥3 reps; new §9 lifts state machine, telemetry schema, failure taxonomy, and resumability from SD-010.
